'''Virginia Holt''' authored ''[[Fuzzy as an Ewok]]'' and ''[[Shiny as a Droid]]'', two "Things to See, Touch, and Smell from a Galaxy Far, Far Away" interactive ''[[Star Wars]]'' children's books. Both were published in [[1986]] as tie-ins to the [[Ewoks (television series)|''Ewoks'']] and [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars: Droids'']] animated series, respectively.<ref name="Fuzzy" /><ref name="Shiny">''[[Shiny as a Droid]]''</ref>
